SID_MSCW_ASK_STATUP_AP_AMOUNT._value: How many AP would you like to use for %s?

SID_DEFAULTKEYSETTING._value:
Please select the key settings you want. Each type may have different shortcut keys.

#eBasic#n key setup is suitable for players who are familiar with original MapleStory controls.
#eSecondary#n key setup is suitable for players who are familiar with other online games.

SID_BEAUTY_RESULT_RANDOM_HAIR._value: What do you think? This #Cblue#%s#k is super trendy!\r\nThis hair style will become a legend! Come again whenever you need me. Haha.

SID_BEAUTY_RESULT_RANDOM_HAIRCOLOR._value: The dye has been applied. What do you think? Did it turn out well?\r\nCome by whenever you're ready for a new color. Haha.

SID_BEAUTY_RESULT_RANDOM_FACE._value: The surgery was a success! That trendy and sophisticated look is a work of art! Come by whenever you feel like you need a change!

SID_BEAUTY_CHOICE_HAIR._value: I can give you a fresh new hairstyle.\r\n %s%s can give you your choice of one of a wide variety of hairstyles.

SID_BEAUTY_CHOICE_HAIRCOLOR._value: I'll put a pop of color in your hair! %s%s has many different colors to choice from. Take your time and select one.

SID_BEAUTY_CHOICE_FACE._value: I can give you a fresh new look.\r\nUsing %s can give you your choice of one of a wide variety of faces.

SID_BEAUTY_CHOICE_SKIN._value: Welcome. Would you like to change your skin color? Take your time to select the color you like!

SID_BEAUTY_CHOICE_SKIN_WITH_NAME._value: Welcome. Do you want healthy, beautiful skin? My secret method will completely revitalize you! Shall we change you to %s?

SID_BEAUTY_RESULT_CHOICE_HAIR._value: The operation went perfectly.\r\nWhat do you think? Don't you like it? Come by whenever you want a change. Hehe.

SID_BEAUTY_RESULT_CHOICE_HAIRCOLOR._value: Ta-da! The dye turned out perfect! Changing your hair color has given you a whole new look. Come by whenever you're ready for a new color.

SID_BEAUTY_RESULT_CHOICE_FACE._value: The surgery was a success! What do you think? Do you like your new look? See you next time!

SID_BEAUTY_RESULT_SKIN._value: Here, take a look in the mirror. What do you think? Another satisfied customer, I presume. Come by whenever you want to change your skin!

SID_MAPLECHAT_CONFIRM_EXIT._value: Will you exit this chat room?

SID_MAPLECHAT_ERROR_UNKNOWN._value: You cannot do that right now.

SID_MAPLECHAT_ERROR_ALREADYINROOM._value: That user is already in this chat room.

SID_MAPLECHAT_ERROR_ROOMNOTFOUND._value: Cannot find the room, or the room no longer exists.

SID_ERROR_UNKOWN._value: You cannot do that right now.

SID_ROOMSESSION_NULLUSER._value: The player could not be found.

SID_ROOMSESSION_ALREADYINROOM._value: The player is already in a chat room.

SID_ROOMSESSION_USERDEAD._value: You can’t do this while you’re dead.

SID_ROOMSESSION_NOTACTIVEACCOUNT._value: The player could not be found.

SID_ROOMSESSION_PERMISSIONDENIED._value: You don’t have permission to do this right now.

SID_ROOMSESSION_BASEITEMEXPIRED._value: This item’s usage period has expired.

SID_ROOMSESSION_ROOMNOTFOUND._value: The chat room could not be found.

SID_ROOMSESSION_NOTENABLESTATE._value: The chat room is currently unavailable.

SID_ROOMSESSION_FULL._value: No more players can be invited to this chat room.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_UNABLEWORLD._value: Item trading is not available on this server.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_INVALIDITEM._value: This item is currently unavailable for purchase.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_NOSTOCK._value: This item is sold out and cannot be purchased.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_NOHOSTUSER._value: The seller could not be found.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_DEINEDCASHITEM._value: This Cash item cannot be traded.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_GENDERMISMATCH._value: You cannot trade due to a gender mismatch.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_SELLERSMESOLIMIT._value: The seller has reached the Mesos limit.

SID_PLAYERSHOP_ERROR_INSUFFICIENTMESO._value: You do not have enough Mesos.
